title: Potions, Four Years In
prose: {{potions-professor}} has stopped bothering with warnings about foolish wand-waving — four years in, the class either has the discipline for the dungeons by now or it doesn't. Today's potion is genuinely dangerous if rushed, a Strengthening Solution with a narrow window between 'ready' and 'ruined.'

You watch the colour change through exactly the stages the textbook describes, holding your breath a little at the point where it's supposed to turn from violent purple to a calm, clear blue. It does. Small victories, in this classroom, still count for a great deal.

choices.label: A clean, correct potion — no complaints from the front of the room.
It worked, but your nerves were shot the entire lesson.
